assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (task-6-api-documentation.md) is missing the Test Requirements section. It contains Repository (line 4), Description (line 7), Files to Modify (line 9), Implementation Notes (line 13), and Acceptance Criteria (line 23), but no '## Test Requirements' section exists anywhere in the file. Tasks 1-5 all contain every required section.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service-method.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md, task-6-api-documentation.md. 6 is within the range [3, 10].
Every task file contains '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 4, Task 2 line 4, Task 3 line 4, Task 4 line 4, Task 5 line 4, Task 6 line 4.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Tasks 1 and 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3. Task 6 depends on Task 3. This forms a DAG: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5, 6} with no cycles. Each dependency is explicitly stated in the Dependencies section of each task file.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths exist in the repo-backend.md manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (manifest line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (line 45), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114), README.md (line 5). All Files to Create are new files in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (parent dir exists at lines 40-43), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (parent dir at lines 47-50), tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs (parent dir at lines 110-113).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md lists 6 changes, all concrete: (1) 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with severity count fields (critical, high, medium, low, total)', (2) 'Add advisory severity aggregation query method to SbomService that counts unique advisories by severity using the sbom_advisory join table', (3) 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint with 5-minute cache and optional threshold query parameter', (4) 'Add cache invalidation for advisory-summary when new advisories are linked to an SBOM during advisory ingestion', (5) 'Add integration tests for the advisory-summary endpoint covering success, 404, caching, and threshold filtering', (6) 'Update API documentation to include the new advisory-summary endpoint'. The Affected Modules table specifies exact file paths and change types for each module.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files have a '## Repository' section containing exactly one repository name 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories. Verified in: task-1 line 4, task-2 line 4, task-3 line 4, task-4 line 4, task-5 line 4, task-6 line 4.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (task-6-api-documentation.md) is missing the '## Test Requirements' section. The file contains '## Description' (line 7), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 23), but has no '## Test Requirements' heading. The file ends after the Dependencies section at line 31. Tasks 1-5 all contain all three required sections. The task-description-template.md explicitly lists Test Requirements as a template section (line 38-39).
